codeReview.summary: This fix adequately addresses the prior fleet_status blocker from the original mcp-status-sync-tools review. The original implementation in commit ffce905 swallowed getHead/getBranch/isDirty failures and still returned status "online"; the fix now introduces a distinct "degraded" status, preserves per-operation error details, and retains any successful repo-state fields. The added tests cover all-git-op failure, partial repo-state failure, and the all-degraded response envelope.

summary: Pass. I reviewed the prior failed feature report, both handoffs, the fix transcript skeleton, the original ffce905 implementation, and the fix commit 9981918547e1b298b4c5a1c9f254ef0135fc6410. The targeted degraded-status failure is fixed: apps/mcp-server/src/server.ts now reports reachable hosts with repo-state lookup failures as degraded and includes error details, and apps/mcp-server/test/fleet-status.test.ts adds focused regression coverage for full and partial lookup failures. No new issues were found in this fix's scope; the separate fleet_sync blocker from the original review is unchanged and outside this fix feature's scope.
